flaggedReviews.title: White isn’t right (it’s gray)
flaggedReviews.text: I ordered the white and gold fan however what arrived was a gray and rose gold fan. I thought I accidentally picked the wrong color however they don’t even sell a gray fan. I’m not sure if this is an old color or if the color white is misleading. If you are looking for white, this isn’t it.
flaggedReviews.reason: The customer ordered a product listed as 'white and gold' but received what they describe as 'gray and rose gold,' implying the listing's color description (and by extension its visual representation) does not match the actual product received.
flaggedReviews.relevantQuote: I ordered the white and gold fan however what arrived was a gray and rose gold fan. I thought I accidentally picked the wrong color however they don't even sell a gray fan. I'm not sure if this is an old color or if the color white is misleading.
